title: acalypha pubiflora subsp. pubiflora
intro: Acalypha pubiflora subsp. pubiflora, also known as Red Stork's Bill or Acalypha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acalypha pubiflora subsp. pubiflora include reducing fever, alleviating skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Acalypha pubiflora subsp. pubiflora can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or in capsule form.
